pr.title: Fix Vercel deployment: remove functions block from awdp-site config
pr.body: ## Summary The root `vercel.json` was already fixed (PR #122), but the Vercel project root is likely set to `artifacts/awdp-site/` — making `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json` the **active** config. That file still had a `functions` block causing: > Function Runtimes must have a valid version, for example `now-php@1.0.0` This PR removes the `functions` block from `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json` and adds: - `installCommand: "node vercel-install.cjs"` for proper pnpm workspace install - `/api/*` and `/sitemap.xml` rewrites - Cache headers for `/assets/*` (immutable) and `/resources/*` - Removed legacy `"version": 2` ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify Vercel deployment succeeds after merge - [ ] Verify `https://www.allwindowdoorparts.com/api/healthz` returns `{"status":"ok"}` - [ ] Close PRs #123 and #124 (superseded) ### Notes - If the deployment still fails after merging, the issue is in the Vercel project dashboard settings (Settings → General → Root Directory or Settings → Functions). Please check there and share the build logs so I can help further. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/9bd3cd88f5fd44588b47c179eb66930f Requested by: @alykay1522 --- ## Summary by cubic Fix Vercel deploy for the AWDP site by updating the active `artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json`. Removes the bad `functions` block and adds correct install, rewrites, and caching for stable builds and routing. - **Bug Fixes** - Removed `functions` block that caused the Vercel runtime error. - Dropped legacy `"version": 2`. - **Refactors** - Added `installCommand: "node vercel-install.cjs"` to run a `pnpm` workspace install. - Added rewrites for `/api/*`, `/sitemap.xml`, `/admin`, and SPA catch‑all (excluding `/api`, `/_next`, `assets/`). - Added cache headers: `/assets/*` (1 year, immutable) and `/resources/*` (1 day). Written for commit 453bbdc2904bf4ac5579d25630e0ab19812c66f0. Summary will update on new commits. Review in cubic
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
